institution.name: H Councill Trenholm State Community College

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at H Councill Trenholm State Community College fell 32% between 2009 and 2010 (26.8% → 18.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at H Councill Trenholm State Community College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (16.6% vs 32.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at H Councill Trenholm State Community College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (59.6% → 50.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at H Councill Trenholm State Community College rose 17% between 2007 and 2010 (31.7% → 37.2%).
